
### exercise (pt 1) {.smaller}



* use 1-bit predictor on this loop 

   * executed in outer loop (not shown) many, many times

* what is the conditional jump misprediction rate for `i % 3 == 0`?  for `i == 50`? overall?

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column style="font-size: 150%; width: 30%"}

```c
int i = 0;
while (true) {
  if (i % 3 == 0)
    goto next; 
  ...
next:
  i += 1;
  if (i == 50)
    break; 
}
```

::::

:::: {.column .fragment width=68%}

<table>
<tr><th>i=</th><th>branch</th><th>pred</th><th>outcome</th><th>correct?</th></tr>
<tr><td>0</td><td>mod 3</td><td>???</td><td>T</td><td>???</td></tr>
<tr><td>1</td><td>== 50</td><td>???</td><td>F</td><td>???</td></tr>
<tr><td>1</td><td>mod 3</td><td>T</td><td>F</td><td>---</td></tr>
<tr><td>2</td><td>== 50</td><td>F</td><td>F</td><td>$\checkmark$</td></tr>
<tr><td>...</td><td>...</td><td>...</td><td>...</td><td>...</td></tr>
</table>

::::

:::::

### exercise soln (1) 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExSoln.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExSoln.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExSoln.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExSoln.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExSoln.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}


:::
